_comment: Single source of truth for the accepted ZTool runtime artifact hashes. Current accepted package: releases/1.1.0-alfa/ZTool-1.1.0-alfa-Setup.exe, setup sha256 f87943aec47d7dddd45f383b60ef5642e3c51e8ab2924c330ca77e671c0628af. Both scripts/verify_release_package.ps1 and scripts/sw_test_preflight.ps1 load their default expected hashes from this file. Update here when the accepted build changes.
